name: avg
desc: Calculates the mathematical average of a list of numbers.

name: awk
desc: Pattern scanning and text data extraction tool.

name: base58
desc: Encodes or decodes data using Base58 (commonly used in blockchain).

name: base64
desc: Encodes or decodes data using the Base64 algorithm.

name: bcrypt
desc: Hashes passwords securely using the bcrypt algorithm.

name: bytecount
desc: Counts the exact number of bytes in the input data.

name: camelcase
desc: Converts input text to camelCase formatting.

name: cssminify
desc: Minifies CSS stylesheets by removing unnecessary whitespace.

name: csv2json
desc: Converts CSV table data into a JSON array.

name: csvfilter
desc: Filters rows from CSV data based on specific conditions.

name: csvselect
desc: Selects and extracts specific columns from CSV data.

name: csvsort
desc: Sorts CSV rows based on the values of a specific column.

name: csvstats
desc: Generates basic statistics and summaries for CSV data.

name: cut
desc: Removes specific sections or columns from each line.

name: diff
desc: Compares two text streams line by line and highlights changes.

name: entropy
desc: Calculates the Shannon entropy of the input data.

name: env2json
desc: Parses .env configuration files into JSON format.

name: expand
desc: Converts tab characters to spaces in the input text.

name: grep
desc: Filters standard input based on a given regex pattern.

name: head
desc: Outputs the first part of files or piped data.

name: hex
desc: Converts text to Hexadecimal, or Hex to text.

name: hexdump
desc: Creates a hexadecimal view of any binary or text input.

name: histogram
desc: Generates a text-based histogram from a list of numbers.

name: html2text
desc: Strips HTML tags and returns clean text.

name: htmlclean
desc: Cleans and formats messy HTML code.

name: htmltitle
desc: Extracts the content of the <title> tag from an HTML document.

name: jq
desc: Command-line JSON processor. Extracts specific data from JSON.

name: json2csv
desc: Converts JSON array data into CSV format.

name: json2yaml
desc: Converts JSON data into YAML format.

name: jsondiff
desc: Finds and displays differences between two JSON objects.

name: jsonfilter
desc: Filters JSON arrays based on key/value conditions.

name: jsonfmt
desc: Formats, beautifies, or minifies JSON data.

name: jsonkeys
desc: Extracts and lists all top-level keys from a JSON object.

name: jsonmerge
desc: Merges multiple JSON objects into a single object.

name: jsonpath
desc: Executes advanced JSONPath queries on JSON data.

name: jwt
desc: Decodes and inspects JSON Web Tokens (JWT) safely.

name: kebabcase
desc: Converts text to kebab-case format.

name: linediff
desc: Outputs a simple line-by-line comparison of two text inputs.

name: linkdomain
desc: Extracts domain names from a list of URLs.

name: linkextract
desc: Finds and lists all outbound URLs from an HTML page.

name: lorem
desc: Generates 'Lorem Ipsum' placeholder text.

name: lowercase
desc: Converts all standard input text to lowercase.

name: math
desc: Evaluates mathematical expressions passed via standard input.

name: md_links
desc: Extracts all markdown links [text](url) from a Markdown file.

name: md_strip
desc: Strips Markdown formatting and returns plain text.

name: md_toc
desc: Generates a Table of Contents from Markdown headings.

name: md2html
desc: Converts Markdown text into HTML code.

name: md5
desc: Generates an MD5 hash for given input.

name: metatags
desc: Extracts SEO meta tags from an HTML document.

name: minmax
desc: Finds the minimum and maximum values in a list of numbers.

name: nl
desc: Numbers lines of files or piped data.

name: php-slim
desc: Official PHP WebAssembly runtime (Slim version).

name: python
desc: Official Python WebAssembly runtime.

name: queryparam
desc: Extracts specific query parameters from URLs.

name: random
desc: Generates random strings, passwords, or numbers.

name: regex
desc: Extracts matching custom regex patterns from text.

name: rev
desc: Reverses lines characterwise.

name: rot13
desc: Applies the ROT13 substitution cipher to text.

name: ruby-slim
desc: Official Ruby WebAssembly runtime (Slim version).

name: sed
desc: Find and replace text using regular expressions.

name: sha256
desc: Generates a secure SHA-256 cryptographic hash.

name: shuffle
desc: Randomizes the order of lines in a text.

name: slugify
desc: Converts strings into URL-friendly slugs.

name: snakecase
desc: Converts text to snake_case format.

name: sort
desc: Sorts lines of text files or standard input.

name: stats
desc: Calculates basic statistics for a list of numbers.

name: stripansi
desc: Removes ANSI color and formatting codes from terminal output.

name: tableextract
desc: Extracts HTML <table> elements into CSV format.

name: tac
desc: Concatenates and prints files in reverse line order.

name: tail
desc: Outputs the last part of files or piped data.

name: timestamp
desc: Converts Unix epoch timestamps to human-readable dates.

name: trim
desc: Removes leading and trailing whitespace from lines.

name: uniq
desc: Reports or omits repeated lines in text.

name: uppercase
desc: Converts all standard input text to uppercase.

name: urlencode
desc: Encodes or decodes URL components.

name: urlparse
desc: Parses complex URLs into JSON.

name: uuid
desc: Generates random, unique V4 UUID strings.

name: validatejson
desc: Checks if the provided string is valid JSON.

name: wc
desc: Counts lines, words, and characters in the input.

name: wordwrap
desc: Wraps long lines of text to fit within a specific width.

name: yaml2json
desc: Converts YAML configuration files to JSON.
